lucent.config.title: Lucent Config
lucent.preferences.open_animation.desc: Enable iPhone-style scale animation when opening this screen.
lucent.preferences.ui_blur.desc: Enable background blur effect for a premium frosted glass look.
lucent.preferences.ui_blur_strength.desc: Adjust the intensity of the background blur.
lucent.preferences.language.desc: Choose the primary language for the configuration UI.
lucent.preferences.ui_scale.desc: Adjust the overall size of the configuration interface.
